meta.title: PTK — Promises to Keep: real seed promises (both ledgers, Bazaam-era format)
meta.source: hb1000-os/blueprint/ptk.md (v14 ptk_promises schema + canonical additions) · Bazaam PTK Daily Check-In emails (March 2026, proven live) · AI-Research-Ledger.md inbound (June 2026)
meta.vocabulary: PTKs I Gave (left card, teal) · PTKs Others Gave Me (right card, amber — Ghost Buster). The centre square is an accountability engine — the PTK engine, never a giveaway.
meta.states: promised → in_progress → kept | broken | deferred | cancelled

aging_rules.gave: OUTSTANDING (<7 days) → ⚠️ OVERDUE (7+ days) → COMPLETED (with date). OVERDUE is COMPUTED at render from dueDate — never stored.
aging_rules.received: WAITING (<7d) → 🔴 OVERDUE (7+d) → NUDGED (with date + tone) → RECEIVED. Ghost Buster 14+ days → suggest URGENT nudge.
aging_rules.alert_string: 📤 PTK OVERDUE: You promised [person] you'd [thing] — now [X] days

scoring.grip_mechanism: streak = consecutive days with zero broken promises; breaking a promise resets currentStreak to 0

testosterone_thermometer.label: SLIPPING
testosterone_thermometer.note: Personal level only — hidden on corporate/strategy cards. Value as last seen on the live standalone PTK app (ptkcommit-l3qnncjk.manus.space, 2026-03-25): 'rises when you keep promises, drops when you break them.'

nudge_tones.style: business-like, clear ask, specific timeline request

meta.nudge_rule: Drafts only — Tim sends (estate rule: Gmail is draft-only). Escalation suggestion after 7 silent days: 'You sent a FRIENDLY nudge 7 days ago with no response. Consider: 📋 DIRECT or 🚨 URGENT.'
meta.bazaam_provenance: The Bazaam-site PTK board ran live in production March 2026: daily 7 AM check-in email to all 5 participants (Tim, David, Jay, Bryan, John Frank). The 2026-03-26 check-in reported: full accountability score (0% complete), 2 overdue items (Doors & Roof Caps, Fix Overhead Door), 1 in progress (Optiprime), and all 16 outstanding promises across both ledgers, with a link to the live board.
meta.engine_note: MVP = manual entry + Flytrap free-text extraction only. NO email/Slack scanning — the PTK Promise Engine is Phase 2, explicit opt-in, member-owned data, easy off switches.
meta.a9_fields: Amendment A9 groundwork (additive, 2026-06-11): source = manual (default) | flytrap | harvested (enum ready - the Phase-2 promise engine is NOT built) | completion_level = 0-100 optional, self-declared progress | declared_by = self | agent (who declared the completion) | audit_status = pending | verified | misreported. Self-declared completions stay AUDIT PENDING until verified; MISREPORTED writes an escalation entry to localStorage hb1000-integrity (the future daily-report feed). The monitoring agent itself is Phase 2 - the drawer audit buttons are a labeled SIMULATION.
